aiCuesheet.title: AI Cuesheet
aiCuesheet.description: Input research data and the AI will structure scene-by-scene text content and generate HTML/CSS graphics.
aiCuesheet.placeholder: Enter news scripts or broadcast text here...
aiCuesheet.generating: AI is designing the broadcast structure...
aiCuesheet.noResult: AI-designed cuesheet structure will appear here after you enter text and click generate.

step1.title: 1. System Prompt
step1.hint: Copy the prompt below to your LLM and provide the resulting JSON in the next step.

stepSource.title: 1. Enter Source Material
stepSource.hint: Paste your script, transcript, or research notes here. The AI will analyze the content and generate scene-by-scene text slots.
stepSource.placeholder: Paste your script or transcript here...

sessionList.title: Session
sessionList.emptyHint: Create a new session to automatically design broadcast graphic scenes from your script.

graphicTagging.title: Graphic Tagging
graphicTagging.description: Tag HTML elements in graphic templates with data-semantic attributes for automatic AI content injection.
